violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the cold kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The prep unit and 2-door low boy in the cold kitchen and the prep unit in front of the fryolator and the prep unit in front of the cooktop were observed held at ambient temperature of 47 degrees Fahrenheit or more. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the units were evaluated and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Establishment was observed using time as a public health control for sushi rice. Establishment does not have prior approval to use TPHC for sushi rice and shall submit processes and batch logs for approval by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Guidance provided during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient velocity to flush particulates to the drain. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection and moved to a dry clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The cold kitchen prep unit, 2-door low boy, and the prep units in the hot kitchen were observed held at an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or more and were not in good repair. Establishment is not to store TCS food items within the unit until an ambient of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is maintained. Service was called and arrived during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Sliced was cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Tuna in Reduced Oxygen packaging was observed thawing without oxygen being introduced. Tuna was observed at 38 degrees. Chef cut holes in packaging during inspection to reintroduce oxygen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The non-food contacts surfaces of the celling's near dish area and fry station area. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, residue, and other debris. Areas and high dusting need to be cleaned on a more frequent basis. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
